name: cdcx-cli
description: Agent-first CLI for the Crypto.com Exchange API. Market data by default; live trading opt-in via API keys. Available --services: market (default), trade, account, advanced, margin, staking, funding, fiat.

interface.shortDescription: Trade crypto on Crypto.com Exchange from your AI agent.
interface.longDescription: Agent-first CLI with a built-in MCP server for the Crypto.com Exchange API v1. Tools covering spot, futures, margin, staking, and advanced order types. Ships with goal-oriented skills for market intelligence, portfolio analysis, and trade execution. Market data works out of the box with no API keys; live trading is an explicit opt-in via expanded MCP service flags.
capabilities: Real-time market data (ticker, book, trades, candlestick)
interface.defaultPrompt: Give me a market brief for BTC_USDT, ETH_USDT, and CRO_USDT.
